Our Story

Crafted for Scents That Never Fade

JL Perfumes was born out of one simple frustration — most perfumes disappear within the hour. Ours don't. Our oil-based formula clings to your skin and fabric, releasing fragrance slowly throughout the day.

In collaboration with Anna's Collection, every bottle is crafted with care in Tisa, Cebu City — bringing premium quality scents to everyday people at prices that make sense.

🌿
Oil-Based Formula Longer lasting than alcohol-based perfumes
⏱️
All-Day Wear 6–8 hours on skin, up to 48 on clothes
🧴
Skin-Friendly Gentle, no harsh alcohol burn
📍
Local, Cebu-Made Proudly crafted in Tisa, Cebu City

Why Oil-Based?

The Difference You Can Actually Smell

Most perfumes use alcohol as their base — which makes the scent strong at first, then gone within hours. Oil-based perfumes work differently.

01

Lasts Longer

Oil evaporates slowly from your skin — releasing scent gradually throughout the day instead of all at once. 6–8 hours on skin, up to 48 on your clothes.

02

Gentler on Skin

No alcohol means no dryness, no irritation, and no harsh burning feeling. Just smooth fragrance that feels as good as it smells.

03

Better Value

Because the scent lasts longer, you use less per application. One bottle goes further — giving you more value for every peso spent.
